creator: me@falz.net
text:
Additional note on this, upon startup mysql-proxy now wants 3
additional parameters passed which can be done via "mysql_proxy_args"

	--admin-username=
	--admin-password=
	--admin-lua-script=/usr/local/lib/mysql-proxy/lua/admin.lua

Unsure the best way for this to be handled, leaving decision to
maintainer. pkg-message about it perhaps?
